debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
n : ℕ
v : Vector α n
f : α → β
⊢ Vector.mapIdx (fun x => f) v = Vector.map f v

failed_attempts:
cases v
      simp [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, List.mapIdx_eq_enum_map, List.map_map]
      congr 1
      ext ⟨i, x⟩
      simp

      simp only [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map, Vector.toArray_mk, Array.mapIdx_eq_mapFinIdx,
        Array.mapFinIdx_eq_map, Vector.mk.injEq]
      congr 1
      ext i x
      simp

induction v using Vector.inductionOn with
      | empty => rfl
      | append x xs ih =>
        simp only [Vector.mapIdx, Vector.map]
        congr
        exact ih

      congr 1

      simp
